step_rationale: Regulates angiogenesis in reperfused myocardium; post-MI healing marker, not cascade-specific.
mechanism: MicroRNA-26a regulates pathological angiogenesis in myocardial repair but is off-pathway to atherothrombotic occlusion.

references.title: MicroRNA-26a regulates pathological and physiological angiogenesis by targeting BMP/SMAD1 signaling.
